subject: chinese
title: PSLE 华文 — 写作套话 (Q33 + Q40)

stats.headline: PSLE 华文 Q33 (写作 4 分) + Q40 (意见 4 分) = 8 分。题目每年都变, 但格式和"套话"基本相同。背熟套话, 套上去就有分。

keyConcepts.title: 欢迎来到《写作套话》— Q33 + Q40 (8 分稳拿)
keyConcepts.body: Q33 和 Q40 都是"模板题"。意思是: 题目年年换, 但**写法和句式 高度重复**。背熟一套"万能套话", 就能直接用上去。 Welcome — Q33 (writing, 4m) and Q40 (opinion, 4m) are template-based. Topics change each year, but the SENTENCE PATTERNS repeat. Memorise the "set pieces" and slot them in.
bullets:
**Q33: 短文写作 (4 分)** — 电邮、短信、便条
Q33: Short-form writing — email, SMS, note

**Q40: 个人意见 (4 分)** — 同意/不同意 + 理由
Q40: Personal opinion — agree/disagree + reasoning

**方法**: 记住"模板 + 套话", 题目一变只换关键词
Strategy: memorise the template + stock phrases, swap key words
keyConcepts.callout: 下面所有套话都是从 PSLE 真题 2016-2025 的"标准答案"里挑出来的。 All phrases below come from PSLE official model answers 2016-2025.

keyConcepts.title: Q33 模板 — 写作 5 步走
keyConcepts.body: Q33 永远是给某人写电邮、短信或便条, 告诉对方关于一个活动的事。 每一篇都按这 5 步写, 不会出错。 Q33 is always writing to someone about an event/notice. Use these 5 steps every time.
bullets:
**1. 问候 / 称呼** — "X, 你好!" / "X:"
Greeting — "Hi X!" or "X:"

**2. 起因** — 我看到 / 我已经报名 / 我想邀请你
Hook — "I saw…" / "I just signed up…" / "I want to invite you…"

**3. 详情** — 时间、地点、活动内容 (从通告抄重点)
Details — date, place, activity (lift from the notice)

**4. 理由** — 为什么这件事对对方有好处
Reason — why the recipient should care

**5. 结尾** — 号召行动 + "祝身体健康"
Closing — call to action + sign-off
keyConcepts.callout: 做题前先在草稿纸上写下这 5 步, 然后每一步填一句话, 不会漏。 Sketch the 5 steps on rough paper first; fill in one sentence each.

keyConcepts.title: Q33 套话 ① — 问候 + 起因 (开头句)
keyConcepts.body: 电邮和短信开头, 用这几句**百搭**。把 "X" 换成对方的名字就行。 Opening lines that work for any topic. Swap "X" for the name.
bullets:
**X, 你好！** / **X：**
Hi X! / X: (formal)

**我刚报名参加了"___"活动。**
I just signed up for the "___" activity.

**你不是对 ___ 很有兴趣吗？**
Aren't you interested in ___?

**您知道吗？就算 ___, 您也能 ___。**
Did you know? Even if ___, you can still ___.

**我看到学校的通告/广告, 想 ___。**
I saw the school notice/ad, and want to ___.

**我想邀请你 / 提醒你 / 告诉你**
I want to invite you / remind you / tell you
keyConcepts.callout: 告诉自己: 开头不用想太多, 直接套这几句。1 分到手。 Don't overthink openings — slot one of these in. Easy 1 mark.

keyConcepts.title: Q33 套话 ② — 写信的目的
keyConcepts.body: 说清楚"我为什么写这封信"。一句话讲明白。 State why you're writing — in one sentence.
bullets:
**所以特意写此电邮告诉你这个好消息。**
That's why I'm specially writing to tell you this good news.

**我觉得这个 ___ 会对你有帮助。**
I think this ___ would be helpful to you.

**我想请你/你帮我 ___。** (注: 用于便条向爸妈求帮忙)
I want to ask you to help me ___. (for notes asking parents)

**请你 ___ , 并告诉 ___。** (用于复杂请求)
Please ___, and tell ___. (for compound requests)
keyConcepts.callout: "起因句"是给整篇文章定调的, 不能省。 The "purpose" line sets the tone of the whole letter — don't skip it.

keyConcepts.title: Q33 套话 ③ — 详情 (时间、地点、活动)
keyConcepts.body: 这是 Q33 拿分的关键: 从通告中抄出**时间 + 地点 + 内容**。 用下面的句式串起来。 This is where Q33 marks live: lift time + place + activity from the notice, glue them together with these patterns.
bullets:
**这个活动将在 X 月 X 日 上午/下午 X 点 在 ___ 举行。**
The activity will be held on [date] at [time] at [place].

**时间是上午 X 点到下午 X 点。**
The time is X to X.

**报名的方法是 ___ , 收费 X 元。**
Register by ___, fee is X dollars.

**当天我们/你可以 ___, 还可以 ___。**
On the day we/you can ___, and also ___.

**学校将在 ___ 举办 ___。**
The school will hold ___ at ___.
keyConcepts.callout: 通告里 80% 的信息都可以直接抄进作文。这是合法的"抄答案"! 80% of the info from the notice can be copy-pasted in — totally legit.

keyConcepts.title: Q33 套话 ④ — 理由 (为什么对方应该参加)
keyConcepts.body: 光列详情不够 — 要给对方一个"参加的理由"。这些套话最常用: Listing details isn't enough — give the recipient a reason to act. These phrases pull double duty:
bullets:
**你一向喜欢 ___。** / **你对 ___ 很有兴趣。**
You've always liked ___ / You're interested in ___.

**完全符合 ___ 的要求。**
You completely meet ___'s requirements.

**不仅能 ___, 也能 ___。** / **不但能 ___, 还能 ___。**
Not only can you ___, but also ___.

**一举两得, 何乐而不为呢？**
Two birds with one stone — why not?

**我们都希望您有 ___ 的身体。** (写给长辈)
We all hope you have a healthy ___ (when writing to elders).

**这是一项非常有意义的活动。**
This is a very meaningful activity.
keyConcepts.callout: "不但 ___, 还 ___" 是 PSLE 标答最爱用的关联词, 几乎每年都出现。 "Not only … but also …" appears in nearly every model answer.

keyConcepts.title: Q33 套话 ⑤ — 结尾 (号召 + 落款)
keyConcepts.body: 结尾要"催"对方行动。最后再加"祝身体健康"和签名。 Closing should "nudge" the recipient. Add sign-off.
bullets:
**机不可失, 记得 ___。**
Don't miss this chance — remember to ___.

**快快行动吧！**
Hurry, take action!

**我们 X 月 X 日一起去吧！**
Let's go together on [date]!

**您要记得 ___ 哦！** (写给长辈)
Please remember to ___! (to elder)

**待我参加活动后回来, 再跟你分享。**
I'll share with you when I'm back from the activity.

**祝 / 身体健康 / [你的名字]**
Sign-off: Wishing you good health / [your name]
keyConcepts.callout: 落款"祝身体健康"是固定格式, 必须写。漏掉这一句就丢 0.5 分。 "祝 身体健康" is a fixed sign-off — skipping it loses 0.5 marks.

keyConcepts.title: Q33 解题示范 — 2024 年校庆短信
keyConcepts.body: 题目: 写短信给毕业的邻居小文, 邀请他回学校庆祝校庆 50 周年。 看 PSLE 标答如何套用 5 步模板: Prompt: Write SMS to neighbour about school's 50th anniversary. Watch how the model answer follows the 5-step template:
bullets:
**① 问候:** 小文, 今年是我们学校建校 50 周年...
Greeting: "Xiaowen, this year is our school's 50th anniversary…"

**② 起因:** 学校欢迎已经毕业的同学回到学校一起庆祝。我想邀请你一起回校庆祝。
Hook: "The school welcomes graduates back to celebrate. I want to invite you…"

**③ 详情:** 我和你都喜欢跳舞, 我们可以在 10 月 28 日那天一起回学校, 在校庆晚会上表演舞蹈。
Details: "We both like dancing — we can return on Oct 28 and perform at the gala."

**④ 理由:** 当天, 我们还可以去参观学校的历史照片展览, 了解我们的母校。
Reason: "We can also visit the photo exhibition to learn about our alma mater."

**⑤ 结尾:** (短信没有"祝身体健康", 直接用号召语)
Closing: (SMS skips formal sign-off, ends with a call to action)
keyConcepts.callout: 整篇就是把 5 个套句串起来 + 替换关键词 (校庆 50 周年、跳舞、10 月 28 日)。 The whole answer = 5 stock sentences + swapped keywords.

keyConcepts.title: 试一试 — Q33 选最佳开头

interactiveQuiz.label: PSLE 2025 风格 — 写给表哥分享清理海滩活动
interactiveQuiz.stem:
题目: 写电邮给表哥, 分享你刚报名参加的"清理海滩活动"。
下面 4 个开头哪一个**最贴近 PSLE 标答风格**？
options: 表哥, 关于清理海滩活动, 我有话想说。
国文表哥, 你好！我好兴奋, 因为我刚报名参加了"清理海滩活动"。
嗨, 表哥, 海滩活动你知道吗？
国文哥, 学校要我们去清理海滩。
interactiveQuiz.explanation: 标答开头格式是: **称呼 + "你好"+ 兴奋 / 起因句**。"我刚报名参加了 ___" 是标答最常用的起因句。其他选项都太随意或缺少模板要素。 Model answer format: greeting + "你好" + excited/hook sentence. "我刚报名参加了…" is the most-used opening in PSLE answers.

interactiveQuiz.label: 结尾 — 哪一句最像 PSLE 标答？
interactiveQuiz.stem: 一封写给外婆推荐"慢慢动起来"运动短片的短信, 结尾用哪句话**最好**？
options: 外婆, 拜拜。
希望您喜欢看。
外婆, 我们都希望您有健康的身体, 所以您要记得收看短片和做运动哦！
这就是我想说的。
interactiveQuiz.explanation: PSLE 2022 真题标答原句。结尾要做到两件事: 关心对方 + 催促行动。 "我们都希望您有 ___" + "您要记得 ___ 哦"是高频套句。 PSLE 2022 model answer. Closing must do two things: show care + urge action. "We all hope you…" + "remember to …!" is the stock pattern for letters to elders.

keyConcepts.callout: Q33 拿满分的秘诀: 5 步模板 + 套话 + 抄通告里的详情。 Full-marks recipe: 5-step template + stock phrases + lift details.

keyConcepts.title: Q40 模板 — 个人意见 4 步走
keyConcepts.body: Q40 永远是"你同意吗？" / "你认为 X 是怎样的人？" — 4 分。 用这 4 步, 答案稳。 Q40 is always "do you agree?" / "what kind of person is X?" — 4 marks. Use these 4 steps every time:
bullets:
**1. 表态** — 我同意 / 不同意 / 我认为他是 ___ 的人
Position — I agree / disagree / I think he is ___

**2. 主要理由** — 用文中事件支持你的立场 (1-2 句)
Main reason — back your position with passage evidence (1-2 sentences)

**3. 进一步证据** — 再引一处或加个人联想
More evidence — cite another passage point OR a personal connection

**4. 收尾** — 重申立场或下结论
Wrap-up — restate position or conclude
keyConcepts.callout: 不要写超过 5 句话。Q40 满分 4 分, 每个要点约 1 分, 写到 4 个点就够。 Don't exceed 5 sentences. 4 marks ≈ 4 key points — that's enough.

keyConcepts.title: Q40 套话 ① — 表态 (同意/不同意/评价)
keyConcepts.body: 开头要直接表态, **不要绕弯子**。3 种最常见的开头: Open with a direct stance — don't wander. 3 most-common starters:
bullets:
**我同意 / 我赞成 ___ 的做法。**
I agree with / I support ___'s approach.

**我不认同 / 我不赞成 ___ 的做法。**
I disagree with / I don't support ___'s approach.

**我认为 / 我觉得 ___ 是 ___ 的人。**
I think / I feel ___ is a ___ kind of person.

**如果我是 ___, 我会 / 不会 ___。**
If I were ___, I would / wouldn't ___.

**通过 ___ , 我认为他们是 ___ 的人。**
Based on ___, I think they are ___ kind of people.
keyConcepts.callout: 第一句就把立场说清楚 = 拿到第 1 分。 State the stance in sentence 1 → bank the first mark.

keyConcepts.title: Q40 套话 ② — 评价人物 (正面性格)
keyConcepts.body: Q40 经常问"X 是怎样的人？"。背熟这些**正面评价词**, 现场套用: Q40 often asks "what kind of person is X?". Memorise these positive trait phrases:
bullets:
**慷慨且好心** / **善良**
Generous and kind-hearted / kind

**宽容大量** / **懂得体谅别人**
Broad-minded and tolerant / considerate of others

**孝顺** / **出自孝顺之心**
Filial / out of a filial heart

**聪明又注重家庭幸福**
Intelligent and family-oriented

**有爱心、懂得帮助他人**
Loving, knows how to help others

**温柔、聪明**
Gentle, intelligent
keyConcepts.callout: "懂得体谅别人""注重家庭幸福"这种 4 字句, 老师看了就给分。 Compound 4-char traits like these signal "trained student" — examiners reward them.

keyConcepts.title: Q40 套话 ③ — 评价人物 (反面性格)
keyConcepts.body: 碰到批评型问题, 用这些"负面评价词": For criticism-type questions, use these negative trait phrases:
bullets:
**傲慢无礼** / **看不起他人**
Arrogant and rude / looks down on others

**以金钱至上**
Puts money above all else

**不肯原谅别人** / **不体谅别人**
Won't forgive others / inconsiderate

**不尊重孩子的兴趣和选择**
Doesn't respect the child's interests and choices

**强迫 ___ 做不喜欢的事**
Forces ___ to do what they don't like
keyConcepts.callout: 负面评价用 4 字成语效果最好, 比"他不好"高级很多。 4-char negative idioms read way more polished than "he is bad".

keyConcepts.title: Q40 套话 ④ — 引用证据 (从文中找理由)
keyConcepts.body: 光"表态"还不够, 必须从文中找证据支持。这些套句把证据"串"进答案: Position alone isn't enough — back it up with passage evidence using these stitch phrases:
bullets:
**从 X 可以看出 ___。**
From X we can see that ___.

**这说明了 ___。** / **这让我们看出 ___。**
This shows that ___ / This lets us see ___.

**比如 / 例如, X ___。**
For example, X ___.

**虽然 X, 但是 Y。**
Although X, but Y.

**即使 X, 也 Y。**
Even if X, also Y.

**因为 ___, 所以 ___。**
Because ___, therefore ___.
keyConcepts.callout: 每一处证据用 "从 X 可以看出 ___" 包起来, 评分老师一眼就看到要点。 Wrap each piece of evidence in "From X we can see…" — examiners spot the point instantly.

keyConcepts.title: Q40 套话 ⑤ — 收尾 + 加分关联词
keyConcepts.body: 最后一句要"扣题": 重申立场或下结论。多用关联词显得有逻辑。 Final sentence circles back to your stance. Connectors add polish.
bullets:
**因此 / 所以, 我 ___。**
Therefore / so, I ___.

**这样不仅能 ___, 还能 ___。**
This way you can not only ___, but also ___.

**由此可见, ___。**
From this we can see that ___.

**我希望我的 X 是 ___ 的人。** (适用于"还会把他当朋友吗"型)
I hope my X is the kind of person who ___. (for "would you still…" qs)

**答案合理即可** — PSLE 允许各种合理观点, 同意和不同意**都可以得满分**, 关键看理由是否合理。
PSLE accepts ANY reasonable stance — agree OR disagree both score
full marks if reasoning holds.
keyConcepts.callout: Q40 没有"标准答案", 只有"标准结构"。立场可以选, 但套话要规范。 Q40 has no "correct" stance — only a "correct" structure. Pick either side, but use the phrasing.

keyConcepts.title: Q40 解题示范 — 2022 云吞面孝顺儿子
keyConcepts.body: 不用读全文! 这里直接给你**文章摘要**, 然后看怎么套上套话答题。 You don't need to read the full passage! Here's the summary followed by how to slot in the set pieces:
bullets:
**文章摘要 (英文):** A blind father and his son share noodle.
The son loudly orders 2 bowls of expensive wonton noodles,
but secretly tells the waiter he only has money for ONE bowl
of plain noodles + an empty bowl — so dad thinks they both
got noodles. Son does this out of love for his dad.

**题目:** 你认为儿子"骗"父亲, 这么做对吗？为什么？(4 分)
Question: Do you think the son was right to "trick" his dad? Why? (4m)

**第 1 句 (表态):** 我认为儿子这么做是对的。
Sentence 1 (position): I think the son was right.

**第 2 句 (理由 — 用"出自 ___ 之心"套话):** 儿子这么做, 是出自于孝顺之心。
Sentence 2 (reason — "out of … heart"): The son did this out of a filial heart.

**第 3 句 (证据 — 串两个要点):** 他希望能让父亲吃到好吃的云吞, 同时又能让父亲以为自己也吃到了好吃的云吞。
Sentence 3 (evidence — stitches two points): He wanted dad to taste the wonton, and let dad think he also had some.

**第 4 句 (结论):** 这样父亲就能吃得安心自在。
Sentence 4 (conclusion): This way dad could eat with peace of mind.
keyConcepts.callout: 4 句话, 4 分到手。每句一个套话 + 文中事实。 4 sentences = 4 marks. Each sentence = one stock phrase + one passage fact.

keyConcepts.title: 试一试 — Q40 (2024 小袋鼠强迫练拳)

interactiveQuiz.label: 题目 + 文章重点都给你, 选最贴近 PSLE 标答的开头
interactiveQuiz.stem:
**文章重点 (中文):** 袋鼠爸妈强迫小袋鼠练拳。袋鼠不喜欢练拳, 他想学魔术。
外公看出小袋鼠很委屈, 把他带回家, 让他学魔术。妈妈最后明白了, 让小袋鼠
追逐自己的兴趣。
**题目:** 小袋鼠的父母坚持要他练拳。你同意他们的做法吗？为什么？(4 分)
下面哪个开头**最贴近 PSLE 标答风格**？
options: 我觉得袋鼠爸妈不太好, 因为他们太凶了。
我不认同他们的做法。他们应该尊重孩子的兴趣和选择, 而不是逼他们做不愿做的事。
这件事很难说, 因为父母也是为孩子好。
袋鼠爸妈错了, 不应该打孩子。
interactiveQuiz.explanation: PSLE 2024 标答原句。要点: ① 直接表态 ("我不认同") ② 给出原则性理由 ("应该尊重 ___ 而不是 ___")。其他选项太口语化或缺少 4 字句结构。 PSLE 2024 official answer. Key moves: ① direct stance ② principled reason using "should respect … rather than …". Other options are too colloquial or missing the 4-char structure.

interactiveQuiz.label: 继续这道题 — 接下来该用哪句套话？
interactiveQuiz.stem:
你已经写了 "我不认同他们的做法。" 接下来题目还问: "如果你的父母要求你
做不喜欢的事, 你会怎么做？" 接下来该用哪一句**最像标答**？
options: 我会跟他们吵架, 让他们知道我不开心。
我会偷偷不做, 让他们以为我做了。
我会用平和的语气表达自己的感受, 说明为什么不喜欢做这件事。
我没办法, 只能听他们的。
interactiveQuiz.explanation: PSLE 2024 标答原句。要点: 用"平和的语气""表达自己的感受""说明为什么" 三个高级短语, 同时不顶撞父母。这就是 PSLE 喜欢的"成熟孩子"答法。 PSLE 2024 official answer. Key phrases: "calm tone", "express my feelings", "explain why" — mature, non-confrontational tone. This is the "model student" voice PSLE rewards.

keyConcepts.callout: 你不用读全文。文中重点都给你了, 你只要选/套对的套话就行。 You didn't have to read the passage — relevant facts handed to you. Just pick the right set piece.

keyConcepts.title: 再试一题 — Q40 (2025 妈妈的糖果瓶教育)

interactiveQuiz.label: Q40 收尾句 — 哪一句最像 PSLE 标答？
interactiveQuiz.stem:
**文章重点 (中文):** 妈妈让两个吵架的哥哥相亲相爱: 每做一件好事, 就放一颗
糖果进瓶子里。瓶子装满了, "圣诞老人"才会来。哥哥们不再吵架, 还会一起讨论
怎么帮助家人。
**题目:** 你同意文中妈妈教育孩子的方法吗？试加以说明。(4 分)
你已经写了: "我同意妈妈教育孩子的方法。把做好事和放糖果连接起来, 会让孩子
愿意主动帮忙。" 收尾该用哪一句？
options: 反正最后两个哥哥变好了。
这样不仅能减少吵架的次数, 还能让他们学会关心家人。
我也觉得糖果很好吃。
我喜欢圣诞老人。
interactiveQuiz.explanation: PSLE 2025 标答风格。"这样不仅能 ___, 还能 ___" 是 Q40 最爱的收尾关联词。 能多带一个要点 + 显出逻辑层次。其他选项要么离题, 要么不像答题。 PSLE 2025 style. "This way you can not only … but also …" is THE favourite closing connector — adds one more point AND signals logic.

keyConcepts.callout: Q33 + Q40 加起来 8 分。背熟套话, 直接套, 不用临场组织语言。 Q33 + Q40 = 8 marks total. Memorise the phrases, slot them in — no improvisation needed under exam stress.

keyConcepts.title: 开始练习吧！
keyConcepts.body: 这套练习用 PSLE 真题 2016-2025 的 Q33 + Q40 改编。每一题都会 告诉你**文章重点 (中文)**, 让你专心练"套话"。 Practice quizzes drawn from PSLE 2016-2025 Q33 + Q40. Each item gives you the passage summary in Chinese so you can focus on USING the set pieces, not reading.
bullets:
**Q33 (写作) 5 题 + Q40 (意见) 5 题 = 10 题**
Q33 writing × 5 + Q40 opinion × 5 = 10 items

每题都附文章摘要, 不用读全文
Each item has a passage summary — no full-passage reading

做错的题会自动记录, 一周后复习
Wrong answers auto-saved, reviewed in 1 week

quizSpec.title: Mastery: 华文写作套话 (Q33 + Q40)

keyWords.definition: Set pieces — fixed phrases / sentence patterns that work across many topics. Memorise once, use many times.
Hook sentence — tells the reader WHY you're writing. Usually sentence 2 of Q33.
Sign-off — closing phrase + your name at the end of formal letters and emails. '祝身体健康' + name is the standard.
State your position — first sentence of Q40 answer. Must be DIRECT, not hedged.
Connector — links sentences logically (因此, 所以, 不仅…还). Q40 model answers use one in nearly every sentence.
Personal opinion — Q40's question type. PSLE accepts either stance; what's marked is structure + reasoning, not which side you pick.

subTopics.label: Q33 写作 (电邮/短信/便条)
subTopics.description: Q33 short-form writing — emails, SMS, notes based on a notice/ad. 5-step template + 5 sets of stock phrases (greeting / hook / details / reason / closing). 4 marks.

subTopics.label: Q40 个人意见
subTopics.description: Q40 personal opinion — 'do you agree?' / 'what kind of person?' Stock phrases for stating position, citing evidence, describing character traits, connecting reasoning. 4 marks. Either stance scores full marks if structure holds.
